text: Water boils at 100 degrees Celsius at sea level.
gold_reason: This is a well-established fact in physics. Water boils at 100°C (212°F) at standard atmospheric pressure (1 atm).

text: Bats are completely blind and rely solely on echolocation.
gold_reason: All bat species can see. Many fruit bats have excellent vision. Echolocation is used in addition to vision, not as a replacement.

text: The speed of light in a vacuum is approximately 300,000 kilometers per second.
gold_reason: The speed of light is approximately 299,792 km/s, commonly rounded to 300,000 km/s. This is correct.
